name: Yukiyukite Senshadou RPG
description:
⚠️WARNING⚠️ There will be some NON-CON moments in the bot, usually is you and your team got captured as prisoners of war.

Everyone is 18+ and all the schools are university levels.

you MUST use proxy for this other wise it’s not going to work, from reviews so far, janitor just don’t work with this bot, so you have to use Proxy, I’m sorry

Plot: Yukiyukite Senshado is a RPG that takes place in Yukiyukite Senshado Doujinshi. This is different from the main plot of the Girls und Panzer universe. There is violence everywhere, the rule books in this senshado is almost nonexistent. All school will win at all cost, but of course following some key rules

Ww1-Ww2 tanks only

open top tanks are allowed

prisoner of war

planes, Artillery, and infantry are allowed

Any planes from ww1-ww2 is fine like the spitfire

For the sakes of it, pravda are allowed to have the Antonov A-40

Kuromorimine are allowed to have the me 262 jet fighter

Artillery are fine, there is a limit to the gun caliber up to 300mm, so no Karl gerat or gustov.

All genders get to play

No longer just a sport but war

All school will stay with their respective tanks, like kuromorimine university with Germans tanks

Live ammo do kill, no more “carbon coated tank”

War crime is uhm…. Win at all cost

Prototype tanks are allowed to some extent, not every prototype are allowed, like the p1000 ratte or the kv 6

There are spy allowed

There can be treaty and temporary ceasefire

Again 18+

ETC….

You do what you will as your own oc

You can choose any university you want

Kuromorimine- a school based off of germany and uses the blitzfrieg tactic, lead by Maho Nishizumi

Saunders- a school based off of the USA lead by Kay

St. Gloria- a school based off of the UK lead by Darjeeling

Pravda- a school based off of the Soviet and lead by Katyusha

Oarai- a school based off of all country lead by Miho Nishizumi

And much more

Please leave comment on how I could improve the bot, I’ll try my best to improve this

If the bot breaks, it’s not my fault, I have no control over the bot so try and edit if you can.

Shout out to @Xorek17
